calendar.matters:
Motion To Substitute New Class Representative And Lift The Stay, P&A, Declaration
Off Calendar May-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Alioto, Esq., TRUMP, ALIOTO, TRUMP & PRESCOTT appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Janice Groom and Loys Everett. Mark A. Chavez, Esq., CHAVEZ & GERTLER, (415)381-5572 appeared on behalf of intervenor Ross Gordon. Mark D. Lonergan, Esq., SEVERSON & WERSON (415) 398-3344, appeared on behalf of defendant and opposing party Ford Motor Credit.

After argument plaintiff Janice Groom's motion to substitute new class representative and to lift the stay was denied. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of 1-Order Denying Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement, And 2- Order Granting Stay
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark Joseph Kenney, Esq. of SEVERSON & WERSON 398-3344 for defendant FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY moving for reconsideration of (1) order denying preliminary approval os class action settlement and; (2) order granting stay
Mark A. Chavez, Esq. of CHAVEZ & GERTLER LLP 381-5599 for intervenor KIM S. ROSS GORDON opposing party
Russell F. Brasso, Esq. of FOREMAN & BRASSO 433-3475 for Plaintiff JANICE A. GROOM
Mario N. Alioto, Esq. of TRUMP, ALIOTO, TRUMP & PRESCOTT 563-7200 also appearing for Plaintiff JANICE A. GROOM

Argued and the Court denied the motion for reconsideration. Eric Throne, CSR 7855 (JJM/bk)

MOTION For Reconsideration

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jonathan E. Gertler, Esq. of CHAVEZ & GERTLER LLP 381-5599 for KIM S. ROSS GORDON moving for leave to intervene
Mario N. Alioto, Esq. of TRUMP, ALIOTO 563-7200 for Plaintiff and opposing party
Regina J. McClendon, Esq. of SEVERSON & WERSON 398-3344 for defendsant FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY opposing party
